title: Austrocylindropuntia albiflora
taxonomy: Austrocylindropuntia albiflora is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. It is a type of columnar cactus native to South America. More specifically, Austrocylindropuntia albiflora is a member of the genus Austrocylindropuntia, which is a group of cacti known for their cylindrical stems and funnel-shaped flowers. Within the Cactaceae family, Austrocylindropuntia albiflora is part of the subfamily Opuntioideae. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
